nasb.text: He had a bronze helmet on his head, and he was clothed with scale-armor which weighed five thousand shekels of bronze.

esv.text: He had a helmet of bronze on his head, and he was armed with a coat of mail, and the weight of the coat was five thousand shekels of bronze.

cnv.text: 他頭戴銅盔，身穿鎧甲，鎧甲的銅重五十七公斤。

ccb.text: 头戴铜盔，身穿重达五十七公斤的铠甲，
